title: MischaCraft
description: MischaCraft is a modpack designed to enhance vanilla Minecraft by adding quality of life mods and small gameplay enhancements.
body:
## MischaCraft is a vanilla based modpack that adds a lot of quality of life mods to the base vanilla Minecraft.
### MischaCraft adds mods to enhance Minecraft's visuals, world generation, structures and dungeons.
**Because MischaCraft is a small and light weight modpack, most computers are able to handle it.**
